howToFly: Your pointer controls the pitch and roll of your spaceship. The neutral position is at the center of the screen.
autoPilotEngaged: Auto-pilot engaged. Sit back and relax.
howToHyperSpace: Align your ship with the system target using the target helper on the bottom right of your screen then press {{bindingsString}} to make a hyperspace jump.
notEnoughFuel: Cannot perform the hyperspace jump. Not enough fuel! You can refuel at a station or scooping around a star or gas giant.
saveVersionMismatch: [VERSION_WARNING] The save file version ({{saveVersion}}) does not match the current version ({{currentVersion}}). Loading may result in unexpected behavior.
invalidSaveFileJson: The save file is not a valid JSON. Please check your save file.
failedToParseSaves: Could not parse saves. Please check the console for more information.
invalidStorageFormat: Invalid storage format. Please check the console for more information.
unknownKeyboardLayout: Could not detect your keyboard layout. QWERTY layout will be used by default.
lowFuelWarning: Warning: Low Fuel! Please refuel soon to avoid being stranded in space.
invalidSaveFile: The save file is invalid. Please check your save file.
unexpectedCrashHelp:
An unexpected error has occurred!

The crash log has been downloaded to your computer, please go to the issue tracker and open a new bug issue with the crash log attached. If you don't have a GitHub account, you can send an email to barth.paleologue@cosmosjourneyer.com instead.
shareLinkCreationFailed: Could not create a shareable link.
screenshotCameraMissing: Cannot take screenshot: camera is null.
tutorialSaveLoadFailed: The tutorial save has errors and could not be loaded. Check the console for more information.
missingShipForPlayerLocation: Player is in a spaceship, but the spaceship cannot be found. Loading was aborted.
nestedSpaceshipNotSupported: Spaceship inside spaceships is not yet supported. Loading was aborted.
systemModelNotFoundForLocation: Cannot load location: star system model not found. Loading was aborted.
spawnObjectNotFoundFallback: The object you are trying to spawn near could not be found. You were moved near the first stellar object of the system instead.
spawnStationNotFoundFallback: The station you are trying to spawn at could not be found. You were moved near the first stellar object of the system instead.
noLandingPadsFallback: There are no available landing pads at the target station. You were moved outside of the station instead.
landingReminder: Don't forget to send a landing request with {{bindingsString}} before approaching the facility.
cannotLandWarpDriveEnabled: Cannot land while warp drive is enabled. You can use {{bindingsString}} to toggle your warp drive.
noOwnedSpaceship: You do not own a spaceship.
noWarpDriveInstalled: Your current spaceship has no warp drive. Install one to plot an itinerary.
pathNotFoundToTarget: Could not find a path to the target system after {{iterations}} iterations.
saveUrlCreationFailed: Could not create a URL from the save file.
